ddls:
CREATE TABLE "centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the center */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the center */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_programs" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local partner */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id", "program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_counties" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local partner */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id", "county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "center_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community outreach center */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_center_contacts_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local partner */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the local partner information */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the local partner information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community program */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., number of participants) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_metrics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES community_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the local partner */,
  "partner_type" TEXT /* Type of local partner (e.g., senior center, goodwill organization) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the local partner */,
  "mission_statement" TEXT /* Mission statement of the local partner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the local partner */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the local partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "partner_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the local partner */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_partner_contacts_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES local_partners ("partner_id")
)
column_names: ID of the community outreach center
Email address of the contact person
Phone number of the contact person
Role of the user (e.g., admin, user)
Whether the user can view the local partner information
Whether the user can edit the local partner information
